name: Secure Deletion with SDelete
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Thomas Patzke
SIGMA Title: Secure Deletion with SDelete
SIGMA Description: Detects renaming of file while deletion with SDelete tool.

False positives:
- Legitimate usage of SDelete

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ("Event ID" IN('4656', '4663', '4658')) AND (LOWER("Object Name") LIKE '%.aaa' OR LOWER("Object Name") LIKE '%.zzz') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Secure Deletion with SDelete on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ("Event ID" IN('4656', '4663', '4658')) AND (LOWER("Object Name") LIKE '%.aaa' OR LOWER("Object Name") LIKE '%.zzz') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Secure Deletion with SDelete

Event description: Converted from SIGMA Rule.  Original Author: Thomas Patzke SIGMA Title: Secure Deletion with SDelete SIGMA Description: Detects renaming of file while deletion with SDelete tool.  False positives: - Legitimate usage of SDelete  This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Event Name
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
